name: Logfire MCP Server
description: This repository contains a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with tools that can access the OpenTelemetry traces and metrics you've sent to Logfire. This MCP server enables LLMs to retrieve your application's telemetry data, analyze distributed traces, and make use of the results of arbitrary SQL queries executed using the Logfire APIs.

tools.name: find_exceptions
tools.description: Get exception counts from traces grouped by file

age.description: Number of minutes to look back (e.g., 30 for last 30 minutes, max 7 days)

tools.name: find_exceptions_in_file
tools.description: Get detailed trace information about exceptions in a specific file

filepath.description: Path to the file to analyze

age.description: Number of minutes to look back (max 7 days)

tools.name: arbitrary_query
tools.description: Run custom SQL queries on your OpenTelemetry traces and metrics

age.description: Number of minutes to look back (max 7 days)

tools.name: get_logfire_records_schema
tools.description: Get the OpenTelemetry schema to help with custom queries

env.name: LOGFIRE_READ_TOKEN
env.description: Logfire read token for API access
